title: Sky's 3D Bars
body:
# ⭐ Sky's 3D Bars

## 🤔 What is this
Some new models for the vanilla minecraft bars.

## 🚧 All bars!
This resource pack support all new copper's bars

## 🔧 Supported textures
This pack does not add any new texture, all of your bars textures should be compatible with this new model!
